Operation 'createPush' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description explains targeting options well but lacks critical information about authentication requirements, return values (push_id), and delivery behavior. Added authentication method, return value details, and platform support information to improve AI agent understanding of what this operation does and what to expect.

data.current_description: Send a push notification to targeted devices. Supports targeting by tags, aliases, registration IDs, segments, or broadcast to all.
data.description_suggestion: Send a push notification to targeted devices. Supports multiple targeting strategies including tags, aliases, registration IDs, segments, or broadcast to all devices. Requires HTTP Basic Authentication with appkey:master_secret credentials. Returns a push_id for tracking delivery status. The notification is queued for immediate delivery to matching devices across Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS platforms.
data.reasoning: The current description explains targeting options well but lacks critical information about authentication requirements, return values (push_id), and delivery behavior. Added authentication method, return value details, and platform support information to improve AI agent understanding of what this operation does and what to expect.

message: Operation 'createGroupPush' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, vague_description. The current description is vague about scope, authentication format, and return values. Enhanced description clarifies that notifications reach devices across all group apps, specifies the exact authentication credential format for group-level access, explains the return value for tracking, and references available targeting options for consistency with the createPush operation.

data.current_description: Send a push notification across multiple apps in a group. Uses group-level authentication.
data.description_suggestion: Send a push notification across multiple apps within a group. Requires HTTP Basic Authentication with group-level credentials (group-GroupKey:GroupMasterSecret). The notification is delivered to all matching devices across all apps in the group. Returns a group_push_id for tracking delivery status across the group. Supports the same targeting strategies as individual push notifications (tags, aliases, registration IDs, segments, or broadcast).
data.reasoning: The current description is vague about scope, authentication format, and return values. Enhanced description clarifies that notifications reach devices across all group apps, specifies the exact authentication credential format for group-level access, explains the return value for tracking, and references available targeting options for consistency with the createPush operation.
